productTitle: MikroTik Automotive Power Adapter APA-1 – Car Power for RouterBOARD
name: MikroTik Automotive Power Adapter APA-1
title: MikroTik Automotive Power Adapter APA-1 – Car Power for RouterBOARD
title_extended: MikroTik Automotive Power Adapter APA-1 – Car Power for RouterBOARD
description:
Multi-Layer Protection. The APA-1 Automotive Power Adapter safeguards your devices from aggressive vehicle environments, ensuring their safety and operational integrity. Its comprehensive protection features effectively neutralize voltage spikes, preventing damage caused by faulty car batteries, harness coupling, jump-starting, or even switching the AC unit. The built-in gas discharge tube serves as a key component in this protection system. When subjected to high voltage, the gas ionizes, creating a low-resistance path for the excess voltage to dissipate, effectively neutralizing the spike and shielding your devices from harm.

The inclusion of a transient voltage suppressor (TVS) semiconductor complements the gas discharge tube, providing an extra layer of defense against extreme voltage spikes. This combination ensures that your devices remain protected even from the most severe electrical hazards. In addition to these primary protection features, the APA-1 employs active polarity protection, preventing damage caused by accidental power reversal. This feature detects and corrects any polarity errors, ensuring that your devices are safeguarded even in instances of improper power connection. The output voltage can be easily modified via jumper position, but there’s also a pass-through mode – in case if you don’t need input voltage regulation.
